assertionResults.reason: Page rendered successfully at http://localhost:3102 with dark theme active (computed body background: rgb(19, 19, 19)). No Tamagui/React hydration errors were found in filtered console checks (no matches for tamagui|hydrat|react). Console had repeated 429 API errors, but none referenced Tamagui provider/rendering.

Surface tokens are defined in web/tamagui.config.ts (surface1 #131313, surface2 #1F1F1F, surface2Hovered #242424, surface3 rgba(255,255,255,0.12), surface3Solid #393939). Computed UI values: body background rgb(19, 19, 19), token selector background rgb(31, 31, 31), stat row border-bottom oklab(... / 0.12) with 1px solid, and an input card border candidate at rgb(36, 36, 36) (#242424).

Neutral text colors are applied: heading text computed as rgb(255, 255, 255) (neutral1), secondary labels include rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.65) / oklab(... / 0.65) (neutral2), and muted text/placeholder computed as rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.38) (neutral3).
Computed page background on <body> is exactly rgb(19, 19, 19), matching #131313.

Theme config defines required spacing tokens (4, 8, 12, 16, 20, 24, 32, 40, 48, 60) in web/tamagui.config.ts. Rendered UI computed styles confirm at least 5 values in use: 4px (nav gap), 8px, 12px, 16px, 20px, 24px, 32px, 40px, and 48px.

frictions.description: Console output was noisy with continuous 429 responses during visual validation, which can obscure UI-framework error scanning.
frictions.resolution: Used focused console filtering (tamagui|hydrat|react) and style-based checks for assigned assertions.

summary: Validated 5 assigned assertions (FOUNDATION-001, 002, 003, 006, 007): 5 pass, 0 fail, 0 blocked. Evidence saved under missionDir/evidence/tamagui-foundation/foundation-theme and flow report written to the assigned output path.
